title: Mystery of the Kingdom of God
original_title: Mystery of the Kingdom of God
overview: Andrew is chosen by God and is called out of his mischievous childhood to partake in the kingdom of God. Andrew must go through trials, tests, and spiritual warfare, before the mystery of the kingdom of God is finally revealed to him.
